title: rubus argenteus subsp. oplothyrsus
intro: Rubus argenteus subsp. oplothyrsus, also known as Silver-leafed Raspberry, is a lesser-known species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Traditionally, Silver-leafed Raspberry is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
